---
title: "recorder.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/pennyone/live/recorder.ts"
loc: 16
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.72
style_score: 9.33
intel_score: 9.50
overall_score: 8.46
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 9.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 28 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [AgentPing](file://../types.ts)
- [savePing](file://../intel/database.ts)
- [saveTrace](file://../intel/database.ts)

### Exports
- `recordPing`
- `recordPing`
- `recordTrace`
- `recordTrace`
